title: Partnering with TechForce to Support the Workforce behind Fully Autonomous Ride-hailing
description:
Autonomous vehicles are a growing, strategically important technology for the U.S., and new approaches are needed to help Americans of all backgrounds find opportunities as it expands. Today, we’re delighted to announce a new partnership with the TechForce Foundation, the only national nonprofit dedicated to the advancement of professional technicians ... [continued]

The post Partnering with TechForce to Support the Workforce behind Fully Autonomous Ride-hailing appeared first on CleanTechnica.
